must-gather query-infra (SVC cluster)

hcpctl must-gather query-infra --kusto hcp-dev-us-2 --region eastus2 --infra-cluster hcp-underlay-prow-usw3j688-svc-1 --timestamp-min "2025-12-17 03:24:08" --timestamp-max "2025-12-17 04:10:07"

must-gather query-infra (MGMT cluster)

hcpctl must-gather query-infra --kusto hcp-dev-us-2 --region eastus2 --infra-cluster hcp-underlay-prow-usw3j688-mgmt-1 --timestamp-min "2025-12-17 03:24:08" --timestamp-max "2025-12-17 04:10:07"
